title: McCarthy Tétrault Tax Perspectives: Review of 2022 & 2023 Outlook
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Tax Perspectives: Review of 2022 & 2023 Outlook
Given the numerous tax law changes in 2022, it’s important to stay up to date on the latest developments and their implications on your business.
In our soon to be released Tax Perspectives: Review of 2022 & 2023 Outlook report, we take stock of the last 12 months and look ahead to key legislative trends and developments that can have an impact on the year ahead. Please join us for more insight.
- Christian Meighen , Partner, National Tax Group, Montréal
- Nicolas Cloutier , Partner, National Tax Group, Montréal
- Dominic Bédard-Lapointe , Partner, National Tax Group, Montréal
- Alexandra Carbone , Associate, National Tax Group, Montréal
- Simon Douville , Counsel, National Tax Group, Toronto
If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us clientevents@mccarthy.ca
Note: You will be able to participate virtually; the seminar will be broadcasted live. All instructions and information related to access the webinar will be sent to you a few days prior to the event.
Mandatory continuing education for Quebec CPAs: This program is equivalent to 1 hour of content. You can find more information on the continuing education requirements for Quebec CPAs here: https://cpaquebec.ca/fr/membres-cpa/obligations/formation-continue-obligatoire/exigences/
Continuing education of the Barreau du Québec: This program is equivalent to a maximum of one hour of content. For more information on the declaration and recognition of educational activities, contact the Barreau du Québec .
Note : This presentation will take place at our Montreal office and will be offered primarily in French. Part of the presentation will be offered in English.
12:00 p.m. - 1:30 p.m. (ET)
